plugins.name: memory-system
plugins.description: [experimental, not production-ready] Structured cross-project memory layer for Claude Code. Auto-injects project + global memory into every session (including subagents), with lazy init, plan-mode reorganization, and lifecycle promotion of mature memory into plugins. Background auditor produces noise — review what lands in ~/.claude/memory/ after sessions.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Claude Code statusline renderer with cross-plugin signal aggregation. Ships a base statusline (context window + 5h/7d rate-limit progress bars) and reads signals from `~/.claude/cache/*/statusline.txt` so other plugins can contribute status segments without coupling. Includes interactive /statusline:install and /statusline:uninstall commands.
